    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    L

    ListComponent - Class in ui.gui.components
    This class provides methods to create various UI components for displaying lists of users, loans, books, genres, and authors.
    ListComponent() - Constructor for class ui.gui.components.ListComponent
     
    Livre - Class in models
    This class represents a book in the database.
    Livre(long, String, Auteur, int, Genre, int) - Constructor for class models.Livre
    Constructor to create a Book object with the specified ISBN, title, author, number of pages, genre, and number of copies.
    LivreAddForm - Class in ui.gui.forms.livre
    This class represents a form for adding a new book to the library system.
    LivreAddForm() - Constructor for class ui.gui.forms.livre.LivreAddForm
    Constructor for the LivreAddForm.
    LivreDAO - Class in dao.controllers
    This class is used to manage books in the database.
    LivreDAO() - Constructor for class dao.controllers.LivreDAO
    Constructor for LivreDAO.
    LivreDeleteForm - Class in ui.gui.forms.livre
    This class represents a form for confirming the deletion of a book.
    LivreDeleteForm(Livre) - Constructor for class ui.gui.forms.livre.LivreDeleteForm
    Constructor for the LivreDeleteForm.
    LivreForm - Class in ui.gui.forms.livre
    This abstract class serves as a base for book-related forms in the application.
    LivreForm(String, String) - Constructor for class ui.gui.forms.livre.LivreForm
    Constructor for the LivreForm.
    LivreGUI - Class in ui.gui
    This class represents the GUI for managing books.
    LivreGUI() - Constructor for class ui.gui.LivreGUI
    Constructor for the LivreGUI.
    LivreModifyForm - Class in ui.gui.forms.livre
    This class represents a form for modifying an existing book (Livre).
    LivreModifyForm(Livre) - Constructor for class ui.gui.forms.livre.LivreModifyForm
    Constructor for the LivreModifyForm.
    LivreView - Class in ui.gui.views
    This class represents a view for displaying the details of a book.
    LivreView(Livre) - Constructor for class ui.gui.views.LivreView
    Constructor for LivreView.
    LogManager - Class in utils
    This class is responsible for managing the logging of the application.
